turnstile.failed: The security check could not load. Please refresh the page.
verify.banner: Please verify your email address. Some features stay hidden until you do.
auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to see your books.
auth.errorExists: An account with that email already exists.
auth.errorWeak: Enter a valid email and a password of at least 8 characters.
auth.errorNetwork: Something went wrong. Please try again.
footer.tagline: Making every child the hero of their own magical adventure. Handcrafted with love and a little bit of magic.
templates.heading: Choose a Story Template
templates.subheading: Find the perfect adventure and life lesson for your little hero. Each story will be personalized with their name, appearance, and favorite people.
gallery.heading: Your Storybooks
gallery.emptyDescription: Create your first personalized storybook and watch the magic happen.
reader.creatingDescription: Our illustrators are drawing each magical page. This takes a few minutes - we're making something special!
notFound.title: 404 Page Not Found
notFound.message: Did you forget to add the page to the router?
wizard.heroSubtitle: Upload a photo to help our illustrator draw them accurately. Optional - skip it and the AI will invent them.
wizard.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop, or click to browse
wizard.tellUsSubtitle: This will be used throughout the story.
wizard.castStepSubtitle: Add your hero, then anyone else who joins the adventure.
wizard.styleSubtitle: Customize how the book looks and feels.
wizard.themeHelp: From your template - the world the story happens in.
wizard.subject: Subject
wizard.subjectHelp: What the story is about. This shapes the pictures too.
wizard.supportingCastSubtitle: Add family members, pets, or friends. Give each an optional photo (used as a reference) or let the AI invent them. Reuse saved characters to keep them consistent across books.
wizard.readySubtitle: Review the details before we weave the spell.
wizard.storyLanguageHelp: Your storybook will be written in this language.
tpl.forest.title: The Whispering Forest
tpl.forest.description: A gentle woodland adventure where your child befriends the shy creatures of an enchanted forest.
tpl.pirates.title: Pirates of the Sapphire Sea
tpl.pirates.description: Hoist the sails! Your little captain leads a brave crew across the waves in search of hidden treasure.
tpl.space.title: Voyage to the Stars
tpl.space.description: Blast off into space, hop between glittering planets, and discover that the biggest dreams are worth reaching for.
tpl.kitchen.title: The Little Kitchen
tpl.kitchen.description: A cozy tale of mixing, tasting, and sharing, where your child cooks up something wonderful for the whole family.
tpl.dinosaurs.title: Land of the Dinosaurs
tpl.dinosaurs.description: Stomp back in time to a world of friendly giants, where your child learns that even the smallest explorer can be brave.
tpl.rainbow.title: Over the Rainbow
tpl.rainbow.description: A bright, magical journey across a rainbow bridge that helps your child believe in themselves no matter the weather.
home.heroTitleA: Turn your little one into the
home.heroSubtitle: Upload a photo, choose a tale, and watch your child become the star of a beautifully illustrated storybook - written and drawn just for them, ready to read tonight.
home.howSubtitle: From a favorite photo to a finished keepsake in minutes.
home.step1Desc: Upload a photo of your child and tell us their name. This is the star of the show.
home.step2Desc: Pick a theme, a life lesson, and an art style. Add family and friends to the cast.
home.step3Desc: CubFable writes and illustrates a complete, personalized picture book, page by page.
home.stylesSubtitle: From dreamy watercolor to bold comic book, choose the world your story lives in.
home.whyTitle: A keepsake, not just an app
home.feat1Desc: Your child's name, likeness, and favorite people, woven into every page.
home.feat2Desc: Pick the illustration style that feels like home, from watercolor to claymation.
home.feat3Desc: Read along in the language of your bedtime, with more on the way.
home.feat4Desc: Download a print-ready PDF and turn tonight's story into a lasting keepsake.
home.finalSubtitle: Create a personalized storybook your child will ask for again and again.
reader.popupBlocked: Please allow pop-ups to download your book.
templates.emptyDescription: New story templates are on their way. Please check back in a little while.
gallery.emptyInvite: Your shelf is waiting for its first keepsake. Pick a tale, add your little one as the hero, and watch a storybook come to life.
account.heading: Account & Settings
account.subheading: Tend to your details and shape how CubFable feels.
account.preferencesSubtitle: Choose the language and mood of your reading nook.
account.languageHint: The language CubFable's buttons and menus appear in.
account.appearanceHint: Read by daylight or wind down into twilight.
account.quickLinksSubtitle: Return to your keepsakes in a tap.
account.linkLibraryDesc: Browse your shelf of finished tales.
account.signOutHint: End your session on this device.
auth.panelTaglineLogin: Your stories are waiting. Open the book and step back into the tale where your child is the hero.
auth.panelTaglineRegister: Every great bedtime story begins with a name. Create yours and watch your child become the hero.
notFound.heading: This page wandered off
notFound.body: It seems this page slipped out past bedtime and lost its way. Let's turn back to a familiar chapter.
notFound.glyphAlt: A crescent moon with a drifting star
library.heading: The characters who
library.subheading: Save the people your child loves once, then bring them back as heroes and companions in every new adventure.
library.emptyDescription: Characters you save here can be reused in future books, so your child's favorite people are always ready for the next adventure.
library.errorHint: Something interrupted the magic. Please try again.
library.addSubtitle: Save someone your child loves so they can join future stories.
library.editSubtitle: Update the details for this saved character.
library.photoHint: Optional. Images are resized on your device before saving to keep likeness while staying lightweight.
library.photoError: We couldn't process that image. Please try another.
library.rolePlaceholder: e.g. Best friend, little sister, brave knight
library.descriptionPlaceholder: A few words about who they are and what makes them special.
library.saveError: We couldn't save this character. Please try again.
library.deleteDescription: "{name}" will be removed from your library. Books that already feature them are not affected.
library.deleteError: We couldn't delete this character. Please try again.
checkout.heading: Complete your storybook
checkout.subheading: One last step, then we bring your little one's adventure to life.
checkout.heroLine: A storybook that opens to reveal {name} as the hero.
checkout.includeIllustrated: A fully illustrated storybook, drawn just for this tale
checkout.includePersonalized: Personalized with your child's name, photo and chosen theme
checkout.includePdf: A high-quality PDF download to keep and print at home
checkout.includeKeepsake: A lasting keepsake, saved in your library forever
checkout.paymentPlaceholder: Card details are not collected in this preview
checkout.consentTerms: I accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
checkout.consentGeneration: I understand generation begins after payment, and that once my personalized book is generated it is non-refundable.
checkout.payNeedsConsent: Please confirm both boxes above to continue
checkout.payError: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.
checkout.trustBody: Your payment is processed securely by Stripe. Your card details go straight to Stripe and never touch our servers.
checkout.notFoundBody: This book may have been removed, or the link isn't quite right. Head back to your library to pick one up.
gallery.deleteDraftBody: This tale has not been paid for yet. The draft will be removed; your saved characters stay in the library.
restyle.title: Choose a new illustration style
restyle.description: The story stays exactly the same; every picture is redrawn in the style you pick. This takes a few minutes.
templates.noMatchesDescription: Try a different word, age or world - every story is waiting somewhere.
crop.title: Frame your character
crop.hint: Move and zoom until the person fills the frame - this becomes the picture the artist works from.
